  • Germany — CET/CEST overlap, GDPR-conscious marketing automation, EUR or USD invoicing
  • UAE — covering Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and the wider Emirates, AED or USD invoicing
  • Canada — same remote model as the US, USD invoicing
  • Australia — AEST/AEDT scheduling, USD invoicing
  • Singapore — SGT scheduling, common hub for regional SaaS and startup clients
  • India — Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi NCR, Pune, Indore, and Hyderabad, INR or USD invoicing

2. What if your country isn't on that list

It's not an automatic no. The two things that actually matter for a remote consulting engagement are: enough overlap in working hours to run live calls on a predictable schedule, and a communication style that works over video and shared documents instead of in-person meetings. If those two conditions are workable, location outside the list above is a conversation, not a dealbreaker.

3. How time zones get handled in practice

Recurring calls are scheduled inside each client's business hours — not fixed to Indian Standard Time. Between calls, updates run async through shared dashboards, documents, and recorded walkthroughs, so a 9- or 12-hour gap doesn't stall a project waiting for a synchronous meeting slot.

4. Currency and invoicing

Pricing is quoted in USD by default. Clients can typically invoice and pay in USD, GBP, EUR, AED, or INR depending on location and preference, through standard international payment methods — no requirement to route payment through an Indian bank account.

5. Why remote works for these specific channels

SEO, paid media, content, and marketing automation are channels where the actual work — audits, ad account builds, content calendars, CRM workflows — happens inside shared digital tools rather than in a physical office. That's the reason a remote-only model holds up for international clients as well as it does for domestic ones.

Not sure whether your specific market and timezone works? The fastest way to find out is to ask directly rather than guess from a list.
item.excerpt:encoded: Which countries Rewansh works with as a remote digital marketing consultant — US, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, Australia, Singapore, India, and more.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Which countries Rewansh works with as a remote digital marketing consultant — US, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, Australia, Singapore, India, and more.
Which countries Rewansh works with as a remote digital marketing consultant — US, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, Australia, Singapore, India, and more.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: rewansh
item.content:encoded:
Rewansh ("we," "us") operates rewansh.com. This policy explains what information is collected when you use this site and how it's used.

Information we collect

  • Contact form submissions: when you submit the contact form, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and message. This is sent via FormSubmit to our email inbox to respond to your inquiry — it is not sold or shared with third parties.
  • Analytics: we use Google Analytics to understand aggregate site traffic and behavior (pages visited, general location, device type). This data is not tied to your name or contact details unless you separately submit the contact form.
  • WhatsApp inquiries: if you contact us via a WhatsApp link on this site, that conversation is subject to WhatsApp's own privacy policy, not this one.

How we use information

Contact form submissions are used solely to respond to your inquiry about our services. Analytics data is used in aggregate to understand and improve the site. We do not sell personal information to third parties.

Third-party services

This site uses FormSubmit (form processing and email delivery) and Google Analytics (traffic analytics). Both may process data according to their own privacy policies.

Your rights

You can request that we delete any information you've submitted via the contact form by emailing kayarerewansh@gmail.com.

Contact

Questions about this policy can be sent to kayarerewansh@gmail.com.
item.excerpt:encoded: Privacy policy for rewansh.com covering contact form data, analytics, and third-party services.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Privacy policy for rewansh.com covering contact form data, analytics, and third-party services.

item.title: Terms of Service
item.dc:creator: rewansh
item.content:encoded:
By using rewansh.com, you agree to the following terms.

Services described on this site

Rewansh provides digital marketing consulting services including SEO, paid media, content marketing, marketing automation, social media marketing, and conversion rate optimization. Pricing shown on this site (Strategy Session, Growth Partner, Enterprise) reflects standard engagement structures; actual scope and pricing for any engagement is confirmed directly with the client before work begins.

No guarantee of results

Marketing outcomes depend on many factors outside our direct control, including market conditions, competition, and platform algorithm changes. Timelines and results referenced on this site (e.g., typical ranges for SEO or paid media traction) are illustrative estimates based on general experience, not guarantees for any specific business.

Content ownership

All content on this site (text, design, and code) belongs to Rewansh unless otherwise credited. You may not reproduce or redistribute this site's content without permission.

Engagement terms

Specific terms for paid engagements (scope, payment, cancellation) are agreed upon directly between Rewansh and the client in writing before work begins, separate from these general site terms.

Limitation of liability

Rewansh is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of this website or its content.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to kayarerewansh@gmail.com.
item.excerpt:encoded: Terms of service for rewansh.com and Rewansh's digital marketing consulting engagements.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Terms of service for rewansh.com and Rewansh's digital marketing consulting engagements.
